title: Authors and Citation
text: Alex M Chubaty. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Chubaty (2026). SpaDES.targets: Orchestrate SpaDES Simulations 'targets'. R package version 0.0.0.9001, https://github.com/-CAST/SpaDES.targets.
code: @Manual{,   title = {SpaDES.targets: Orchestrate SpaDES Simulations with 'targets'},   author = {Alex M Chubaty},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9001},   url = {https://github.com/FOR-CAST/SpaDES.targets}, }

title: Orchestrate SpaDES Simulations with targets
text: Run SpaDES simulations stages targets pipeline. stage runs simInitAndSpades() -process returns discrete components next stage needs — plain objects ordinary targets spatial (terra) objects format = "file" targets — whole simList never serialized across target boundary (avoiding recursive-environment bloat pointer-serialization fragility saveSimList()/loadSimList()). also provides options firewall makes targets sole cache (reproducible.useCache = FALSE, etc.), plus terra-first spatial file-target provenance helpers.

title: Orchestrate SpaDES Simulations with targets
text: tar_simspades(name, modules, inputs, plain, spatial, ...) — target factory: primary target running stage + one format = "file" target per spatial output. run_simspades() — worker (runs stage safe options, extracts components). spades_safe_options() / with_spades_safe_options() — option firewall. write_spatial() / read_spatial() / is_spatial() — spatial file helpers. extract_components() — split needed objects plain values + spatial file paths. provenance_manifest() — software-environment + input/output fingerprints.

title: Orchestrate SpaDES Simulations with targets
code: # in _targets.R library(targets) library(SpaDES.targets)  list(   tar_simspades(     "preamble",     modules = "LandWeb_preamble",     plain   = c("sppEquiv", "sppColorVect", "speciesParams", "speciesTable"),     spatial = c("rasterToMatch", "studyArea", "rstFlammable")   ),   tar_simspades(     "speciesData",     modules = "Biomass_speciesData",     inputs  = quote(list(       rasterToMatch = read_spatial(preamble_rasterToMatch),       studyArea     = read_spatial(preamble_studyArea),       sppEquiv      = preamble$sppEquiv     )),     plain   = character(),     spatial = "speciesLayers"   ) )

title: Orchestrate SpaDES Simulations with targets
text: package developed specific R version using vanilla session (consuming project’s renv library). rig:
code: # install/refresh this package's dependencies in the vanilla library Rscript-4.6.0 --vanilla -e 'pak::install_local_dev_deps()' # periodically update them Rscript-4.6.0 --vanilla -e 'pak::pak()'  # document / test / check Rscript-4.6.0 -e 'devtools::document()' Rscript-4.6.0 -e 'devtools::test()' Rscript-4.6.0 -e 'devtools::check()' air format .

what: SpaDES.targets: Orchestrate SpaDES Simulations with 'targets' — SpaDES.targets-package
title: SpaDES.targets: Orchestrate SpaDES Simulations with 'targets' — SpaDES.targets-package

what: Extract the components a downstream stage needs from a simList — extract_components
title: Extract the components a downstream stage needs from a simList — extract_components
text: Pulls named objects (completed) simList splits kind can become targets right type, without serializing whole simList:

title: Extract the components a downstream stage needs from a simList — extract_components
code: extract_components(sim, plain = character(), spatial = character(), dir = ".")

title: Extract the components a downstream stage needs from a simList — extract_components
text: sim simList (object supporting sim[["name"]]). plain Character vector object names return -. spatial Character vector spatial object names write files. dir Directory write spatial files (created needed).

title: Extract the components a downstream stage needs from a simList — extract_components
text: named list plain objects plus "<name>_path" entries spatial object.

title: Extract the components a downstream stage needs from a simList — extract_components
text: plain objects (data.tables, vectors, scalars, lists) returned -serialize cleanly via default/qs2 target format; spatial objects (terra/sf) written disk write_spatial() returned "<name>_path" character entries, companion format = "file" targets.

what: Build a provenance manifest for a pipeline run — provenance_manifest
title: Build a provenance manifest for a pipeline run — provenance_manifest
text: Records software environment input/output fingerprints targets track (notably upstream package module versions). Use result per-study-area report write alongside outputs.

title: Build a provenance manifest for a pipeline run — provenance_manifest
code: provenance_manifest(   outputs = character(),   renv_lock = "renv.lock",   modules_dir = "modules",   timestamp = format(Sys.time(), tz = "UTC", usetz = TRUE) )

title: Build a provenance manifest for a pipeline run — provenance_manifest
text: outputs Optional named unnamed character vector output file paths digest (md5). renv_lock Path project renv.lock (digested present). modules_dir Path modules/ directory git submodules; pinned commits recorded. timestamp timestamp string. Defaults current UTC time; pass explicit value reproducible (re-runnable) manifests.

title: Build a provenance manifest for a pipeline run — provenance_manifest
text: named list describing run.

what: Read a spatial file written by write_spatial() — read_spatial
title: Read a spatial file written by write_spatial() — read_spatial
text: Reads raster extensions (.tif, .tiff, .grd) terra::rast() anything else (e.g. .gpkg, .shp) terra::vect().

title: Read a spatial file written by write_spatial() — read_spatial
Read a spatial file written by write_spatial() — read_spatial
text: path file path produced write_spatial().

title: Read a spatial file written by write_spatial() — read_spatial
text: SpatRaster SpatVector.

what: Run one SpaDES stage and return its extracted components — run_simspades
title: Run one SpaDES stage and return its extracted components — run_simspades
text: worker behind tar_simspades(). Runs SpaDES.core::simInitAndSpades() -process safe options (with_spades_safe_options()), returns components next stage needs via extract_components(). simList never returned serialized.

title: Run one SpaDES stage and return its extracted components — run_simspades
code: run_simspades(   modules,   inputs = list(),   params = list(),   times = list(start = 0, end = 1),   paths = NULL,   plain = character(),   spatial = character(),   out_dir = ".",   seed = NULL,   .options = list() )

title: Run one SpaDES stage and return its extracted components — run_simspades
text: modules Character vector (list) module names. inputs Named list objects passed simInitAndSpades(objects =) (upstream components). params list module parameters. times list start end. paths list SpaDES paths (e.g. modulePath, inputPath, outputPath). plain, spatial Character vectors naming objects extract; see extract_components(). out_dir Directory spatial file outputs. seed Optional integer seed set run (deterministic replicates). .options Extra options merged spades_safe_options().

title: Run one SpaDES stage and return its extracted components — run_simspades
text: named list: plain objects plus "<name>_path" entries spatial objects.

what: Safe 'SpaDES'/'reproducible' options for targets-orchestrated runs — spades_safe_options
title: Safe 'SpaDES'/'reproducible' options for targets-orchestrated runs — spades_safe_options
text: Returns set options make targets sole orchestrator cache disable known-destructive / non-headless-safe PredictiveEcology behaviours. particular :

title: Safe 'SpaDES'/'reproducible' options for targets-orchestrated runs — spades_safe_options
Safe 'SpaDES'/'reproducible' options for targets-orchestrated runs — spades_safe_options
text: strict TRUE, turn development diagnostics back (spades.debug, spades.moduleCodeChecks, spades.testMemoryLeaks, spades.keepCompleted), production default (FALSE) leaves speed/memory. Use development validate modules.

title: Safe 'SpaDES'/'reproducible' options for targets-orchestrated runs — spades_safe_options
text: named list options suitable base::options() withr::with_options().

title: Safe 'SpaDES'/'reproducible' options for targets-orchestrated runs — spades_safe_options
text: makes caching pass-targets cache (reproducible.useCache = FALSE, etc.); keeps simList serialized disk exit (spades.saveSimOnExit = FALSE) – package never serializes simList; keeps spatial reads terra path (reproducible.rasterRead, reproducible.shapefileRead); guards non-interactive worker hanging browser() (spades.browserOnError = FALSE) blocking download prompt (reproducible.interactiveOnDownloadFail = FALSE). single place encodes option "firewall" – one adapter absorbs upstream option renames/removals (e.g. dev-version renames spades.allowSequentialCaching -> spades.cacheChaining reproducible.useTerra -> reproducible.rasterRead, handled ). Audited SpaDES.core 3.1.2.9016 / reproducible 3.1.1.9062; audit dev bump. set (left caller / per run): reproducible.leaveOnDisk (keep TRUE default, pin terra scratch + memfrac always write_spatial() process/target boundary file-backed rasters stay valid), Google Drive download knobs (reproducible.gdriveNoAuth / reproducible.useGdown), per-project asset-specific.

title: Safe 'SpaDES'/'reproducible' options for targets-orchestrated runs — spades_safe_options
code: str(spades_safe_options()) #> List of 21 #>  $ Require.install                       : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.useRequire                     : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.cacheChaining                  : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.allowSequentialCaching         : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.useCache                 : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.useMemoise               : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.useCloud                 : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.allowInitDuringSimInit         : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.futureEvents                   : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.recoveryMode                   : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.saveSimOnExit                  : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.browserOnError                 : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.interactiveOnDownloadFail: logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.objSize                  : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.useTerra                 : logi TRUE #>  $ reproducible.rasterRead               : chr "terra::rast" #>  $ reproducible.shapefileRead            : chr "terra::vect" #>  $ spades.debug                          : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.moduleCodeChecks               : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.testMemoryLeaks                : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.keepCompleted                  : logi FALSE str(spades_safe_options(strict = TRUE)) #> List of 21 #>  $ Require.install                       : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.useRequire                     : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.cacheChaining                  : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.allowSequentialCaching         : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.useCache                 : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.useMemoise               : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.useCloud                 : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.allowInitDuringSimInit         : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.futureEvents                   : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.recoveryMode                   : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.saveSimOnExit                  : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.browserOnError                 : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.interactiveOnDownloadFail: logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.objSize                  : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.useTerra                 : logi TRUE #>  $ reproducible.rasterRead               : chr "terra::rast" #>  $ reproducible.shapefileRead            : chr "terra::vect" #>  $ spades.debug                          : logi TRUE #>  $ spades.moduleCodeChecks               : logi TRUE #>  $ spades.testMemoryLeaks                : logi TRUE #>  $ spades.keepCompleted                  : logi TRUE

what: Target factory: a SpaDES stage as targets — tar_simspades
title: Target factory: a SpaDES stage as targets — tar_simspades
text: Builds targets one simInitAndSpades stage:

title: Target factory: a SpaDES stage as targets — tar_simspades
code: tar_simspades(   name,   modules,   inputs = quote(list()),   params = list(),   times = list(start = 0, end = 1),   paths = NULL,   plain = character(),   spatial = character(),   out_dir = NULL,   seed = NULL,   format = "rds",   .options = list() )

title: Target factory: a SpaDES stage as targets — tar_simspades
text: name Character scalar; primary target's name. modules Character vector (list) module names stage. inputs quoted expression (e.g. quote(list(rasterToMatch = preamble_rasterToMatch, sppEquiv = preamble$sppEquiv))) giving upstream component targets pass simInitAndSpades(objects =). Spatial inputs arrive file-target paths wrapped read_spatial(). params, times, paths, seed, .options Passed run_simspades(). plain, spatial Character vectors naming objects stage emits; spatial ones additionally get file targets. out_dir Directory spatial file outputs; defaults file.path("outputs", name). format targets storage format primary target (default "rds"; use "qs2" qs2 format registered).

title: Target factory: a SpaDES stage as targets — tar_simspades
text: list tar_target objects (primary first, one per spatial output) — return _targets.R like target list.

title: Target factory: a SpaDES stage as targets — tar_simspades
text: primary target name runs stage (run_simspades()) returns plain components plus "<obj>_path" entries spatial outputs; one format = "file" target name_<obj> per spatial output, whose command name[["<obj>_path"]] targets hashes written file. Downstream stages consume plain components name$<obj> spatial outputs via read_spatial() file target, pass simInit inputs. simList ever crosses target boundary.

title: Target factory: a SpaDES stage as targets — tar_simspades
code: tl <- tar_simspades(   "preamble",   modules = "LandWeb_preamble",   plain = c("sppEquiv", "sppColorVect"),   spatial = c("rasterToMatch", "studyArea") ) length(tl) # 1 primary + 2 file targets #> [1] 3

what: Evaluate code with the safe SpaDES options set — with_spades_safe_options
title: Evaluate code with the safe SpaDES options set — with_spades_safe_options
text: Temporarily sets spades_safe_options() (optionally merged .options) duration code, restoring previous options afterwards.

title: Evaluate code with the safe SpaDES options set — with_spades_safe_options
Evaluate code with the safe SpaDES options set — with_spades_safe_options
text: code Code evaluate. .options named list extra options merge (override) spades_safe_options(). strict TRUE, turn development diagnostics back (spades.debug, spades.moduleCodeChecks, spades.testMemoryLeaks, spades.keepCompleted), production default (FALSE) leaves speed/memory. Use development validate modules.

title: Evaluate code with the safe SpaDES options set — with_spades_safe_options
text: value code, invisibly code invisible.

title: Evaluate code with the safe SpaDES options set — with_spades_safe_options

title: Write a spatial object to a file (for a format =
text: Writes terra SpatRaster (default extension .tif) SpatVector (default .gpkg) returns path. sf/sfc inputs coerced SpatVector first (project prefers terra sf, geotargets sf path). returned path targets format = "file" target yield targets hashes file's contents.

Write a spatial object to a file (for a format =
text: x SpatRaster, SpatVector, sf/sfc object. path Destination file path. overwrite Overwrite existing file? Defaults TRUE.

text: path, invisibly.

title: SpaDES.targets (development version)
text: initial version. tar_simspades() target factory: runs one simInitAndSpades() stage emits components targets (plain objects + one format = "file" target per spatial output); simList serialized. run_simspades() worker: runs stage safe options extracts components. spades_safe_options() / with_spades_safe_options(): options “firewall” makes targets sole cache disables known-destructive / non-headless-safe reproducible/SpaDES.core behaviours. Audited SpaDES.core 3.1.2.9016 / reproducible 3.1.1.9062: adds spades.saveSimOnExit = FALSE (dev default TRUE serialize simList), spades.browserOnError = FALSE reproducible.interactiveOnDownloadFail = FALSE (guards hanging non-interactive worker browser() download prompt); replaces dead reproducible.useTerra reproducible.rasterRead = "terra::rast" keeps reproducible.shapefileRead = "terra::vect" (now meaningful override); sets spades.cacheChaining renamed-away spades.allowSequentialCaching. strict argument turns development diagnostics (spades.debug, spades.moduleCodeChecks, spades.testMemoryLeaks, spades.keepCompleted) back , production default leaves . write_spatial() / read_spatial() / is_spatial(): terra-first spatial file-target helpers. extract_components(): split simList’s needed objects plain values spatial file paths. provenance_manifest(): record R/platform, renv.lock digest, module submodule commits, output digests.
